subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the story of the tunnel adventure
Learn the importance of curiosity and courage
Recognize how teamwork and planning help overcome challenges
Develop reading comprehension and vocabulary skills
Understand the sequence of events and cause-effect relationships

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to the Story
teaching_strategy: Brainstorming about why people explore tunnels or hidden paths
student_activities: Share personal experiences of small adventures
Predict what the story might be about

lesson_plan.title: Reading the Beginning
teaching_strategy: Guided reading of the first part of the story

lesson_plan.title: Exploring the Tunnel
topics_covered: Reactions of the friends during exploration
teaching_strategy: Ask students to imagine the tunnel and obstacles
student_activities: Draw the tunnel as they imagine it
Explain the challenges and how characters react

lesson_plan.title: Conflict and Problem Solving
student_activities: Role-play a situation where friends solve a problem in the tunnel

lesson_plan.title: Climax and Resolution
teaching_strategy: Class discussion on lessons from the adventure
student_activities: Write the moral of the story in their notebook
Share personal lessons learned from small adventures

lesson_plan.title: Language and Revision
teaching_strategy: Revision quiz on story events and vocabulary
student_activities: Form compound words from the given list
Complete conditional sentences based on story situations

teaching_aids: Printed vocabulary and exercises from the chapter
teacher_tip: Encourage students to visualize the tunnel adventure and discuss how curiosity, teamwork, and caution play a role in exploring unknown places.
